title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook that achieved $1M ARR in 117 days and scaled to $10M ARR without external funding. The episode covers key growth strategies including product-led growth approaches, SEO and AEO tactics, warm outbound, pricing experimentation, and churn reduction techniques. Topics include the differences between early stage and scaling phases, co-founder dynamics, and decision frameworks for when to raise capital.
